covered_sentences: I went into the kitchen and looked around with pleasure and pride at all my preparations for Christmas: the shining stove, the clean floor, the fragrant cakes.
I remembered how the old master used to come into the kitchen on Christmas Eve and thank me for my work and give me a shilling as a Christmas present.
Then I began thinking about how fond the old master was of Heathcliff, and how worried he was that Heathcliff would be treated badly when he was no longer there to take care of him.
Then I thought about poor Heathcliff's situation now, and it nearly made me cry.
However, there is no use in crying, so I went to find Heathcliff instead.

Cloud memory bubble in the upper right corner occupies approximately one-quarter of the image. Her expression shows a mixture of pride shifting to sad reflection — brows lightly drawn together, eyes slightly unfocused in thought. A thought bubble near her head (lower): small sketch of the Heathcliff mini-icon in a downward-slumped posture with a shadow around him and a teardrop, expressing her sorrow for his situation. Cloud memory bubble in upper right: inside, an elderly male figure (unrecognizable, non-character-ref silhouette) holds a small coin out toward a younger woman in an apron — warm sepia tone, rendered as a sketch memory scene. At the lower right of the scene, Nelly is beginning to step toward the kitchen far door, suggesting imminent departure to find Heathcliff.

covered_sentences: He was feeding the horses in the stable as usual at that hour.
"Come quickly, Heathcliff," I said. "Come to the kitchen and let me dress you nicely before Miss Cathy comes out. Then you can sit together by the fire and talk till bedtime."
He went on feeding the horses in silence.
"Are you coming?" I waited and waited, but receiving no answer, I finally left him.
storyboard_assets.prompt:

Right panel: camera positioned to the left of Nelly inside the stable, over-shoulder mid-shot looking toward Heathcliff and the horse stall; Nelly's left shoulder and apron edge occupy approximately one-sixth of the left foreground; Heathcliff in three-quarter view continues feeding without looking up; horse stall wooden partition visible at right; background shows stable wall with hanging bridles. Per-panel character budget: left panel 1 (Heathcliff), right panel 2 (Nelly visible from shoulder, Heathcliff center).

covered_sentences: Cathy ate supper with her brother and sister-in-law.
While Joseph and I ate together in the kitchen, Heathcliff did not eat at all.
He worked till nine o'clock, then went straight to bed.
Cathy came into the kitchen to look for him once, but since he was not there, she went back to Hindley and Frances.

covered_sentences: Heathcliff got up early in the morning and went out onto the moors.
He came back when the family had gone to church.
"Nelly," he said, "dress me nicely as you said you would. I'm going to be good."
